summary: Senior Service Delivery Leader/Manager with 30+ years of experience in global telecommunications, specializing in subsea/submarine cable, backbone and data center operations. Strong cross-functional leadership, vendor management and executive communication skills, now adding Agentic and Generative AI expertise to introduce AI-driven insights and automation into network service delivery.
